title: Built & Published VulnScan
description: Created VulnScan, a powerful web penetration testing tool with 20+ modules covering SQL injection, XSS, API security, and AI-based vulnerability detection. Published as a PyPI package, it reflects my deep expertise in cybersecurity and real-world problem solving.

title: Founder - Luno Tech
description: Founded Luno Tech, delivering modern, high-performance websites and digital solutions. Worked with real clients to build interactive, visually rich experiences focused on design, performance, and business impact.
